# Manuscript PR

## What changed?

Briefly describe the manuscript, figure, supplement, or tracking-file change.

## Area

- [ ] Main text
- [ ] Figures
- [ ] Supplement
- [ ] Methods
- [ ] Ordered Bi2Se3/Bi2Te3 results
- [ ] PbI2 / diffuse scattering
- [ ] Repo tracking/organization

## Checklist

- [ ] Builds or does not affect build.
- [ ] Figure captions are updated if figures changed.
- [ ] `MANUSCRIPT_STATUS.md` updated if task status changed.
- [ ] `figures/FIGURE_STATUS.md` updated if figures changed.
- [ ] `2D_Supplemental/SUPPLEMENT_STATUS.md` updated if supplement changed.
- [ ] Main text uses physics language rather than implementation-first language.
